title: PartSelect Returns Policy
content: PartSelect offers a 365-day return policy. Parts must be returned in uninstalled, resalable condition in original packaging. To initiate a return, navigate to your order dashboard or use your order confirmation email.

title: How to Install Dishwasher Heating Element PS11752778
content: Step 1: Turn off power and water to the dishwasher. Step 2: Remove the lower access kickplate panel. Step 3: Use a wrench to loosen the nuts holding the element terminals. Step 4: Extract the old unit upward, place the replacement, and secure nuts tightly.

title: Whirlpool Fridge Ice Maker Not Working
content: Common reasons a Whirlpool fridge ice maker stops working include water line freezes, a faulty inlet valve, or a broken motor module. Check if freezer temperatures are set below 0 degrees Fahrenheit. Inspect the water inlet valve for continuity.
